title: Raytracing Engine
description: Vulkan-based raytracing engine built in C++23. Implements GPU-accelerated path tracing with custom denoising, physical device selection, memory management, and SPIR-V shader compilation. Demonstrates real-time rendering pipeline architecture and compute performance optimization.

title: Majin - Game Engine
description: Modern 3D engine in C++23 with Vulkan. Covers full graphics pipeline: physical device selection, swap chain management, command buffer synchronization, render passes, push constants, and a 2D physics simulation with gravitational field visualization.

title: Chess Engine
description: Compact chess engine for Sebastian Lague's Chess Coding Challenge. Implements negamax search with alpha-beta pruning, transposition tables, and PeSTO evaluation within strict resource constraints (1024 tokens). Demonstrates algorithmic optimization under tight budgets.

title: FEP University Chatbot
description: Production AI chatbot for a Portuguese university. Built with TypeScript and Python, Azure OpenAI for LLM inference, custom deployment pipeline, and monitoring. Demonstrates end-to-end ML system delivery from architecture to production.
